title: Chud the Builder visibly disappointed as bond hits $1.25 million
summary_full: Popular streamer Chud the Builder, real name Dalton Eatherly, appeared visibly upset in court after a judge set his bond at $1.25 million. He faces serious charges including attempted murder following a shooting outside a Tennessee courthouse. Eatherly claims he acted in self-defense, but authorities are investigating the incident as a violent crime.
